samples.xml_description: Implement a carry-lookahead 32-bit adder. 32-bit input operand A. 32-bit input operand B. 32-bit output representing the sum of A and B. Carry-out output. Carry=6'b100000 temp_s[32:1] temp_c[32:1] temp_s[32:1] temp_c[32:1] Implement a carry-lookahead 16-bit adder. carry[4:1] carry[4:1] Gi[3:1] Pi[3:1] temp_s[32:1] temp_c[32:1] <<< Implement a carry-lookahead 16-bit adder >>> <<< Implement a carry-lookahead 32-bit adder >>>
